title: Headpats
description: Ever play with someone you like, and wish you could headpat them? Well this mod simply adds the ability to give head pats to your friends!
body:
# Headpats

> Ever play with someone you like, and wish you could headpat them? Well this mod simply adds the ability to give head pats to your friends!

A Forge 1.20.1 port of [Headpat a Friend!](https://modrinth.com/plugin/headpat). You can now hold right click on another player's head to headpat them!

![Third person headpatting gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff854cea27ce9355e3200fa6b9adfde1ebcf8d52.gif)

## Setup

This mod is required to be setup on both the client and server. This may not work properly without server support unlike the original.

**Note: requires Forge 47.4 or higher or you may get an initialization error**

## Configuration

This mod uses `cloth-config` to configure `First person sway strength` and `Petted players purr`. Note that first person sway strength is also affected by the vanilla distortion settings.

## Credits

- enjarai for the original mod whom I took a bunch of code from
